2606.09368.title: PhysScene: A Scene Graph Dataset for Scientific Visual Reasoning in Physics Experiments
2606.09368.paper_summary: Scene Graphs (SGs) provide structured representations of visual scenes by modeling objects and their pairwise relationships. Despite recent progress, existing datasets primarily focus on generic natural contexts, leaving domain-specific and function-oriented scenes largely underexplored. This limitation restricts the evaluation of relational reasoning in scientific experimental scenes, thereby hindering the development of intelligent monitoring, analysis, and related applications in such scenes. To address this gap, we introduce PhysScene, the first SG dataset tailored to physics experiments. PhysScene encompasses specialized instruments, structured experimental setups, and functional relations intrinsic to experimental environments, enabling reasoning that extends beyond spatial co-occurrence to logical dependencies. Rather than pursuing large data scale, PhysScene focuses on strong semantic constraints and high relation density in experimental scenes, posing new challenges for existing scene parsing algorithms while offering opportunities for further improvements. Extensive analyses and experiments show that PhysScene complements existing benchmarks and establishes a valuable testbed for advancing scientific visual reasoning. The dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/ZMH-SDUST/PhysScene.
2606.09368.paper_summary_zh: 場景圖（SGs）通過建模物體及其成對關係，提供視覺場景的結構化表示。儘管最近有所進展，但現有數據集主要集中在通用自然環境上，導致特定領域和功能導向的場景尚未得到充分探索。這一限制限制了在科學實驗場景中對關係推理的評估，從而妨礙了在此類場景中智能監控、分析及相關應用的發展。為了解決這一空白，我們推出了PhysScene，這是第一個專為物理實驗量身定制的SG數據集。PhysScene涵蓋專業儀器、結構化實驗設置及實驗環境中固有的功能關係，使推理超越空間共現，延伸至邏輯依賴。PhysScene並不追求大數據規模，而是專注於實驗場景中的強語義約束和高關係密度，為現有場景解析算法提出了新的挑戰，同時也提供了進一步改進的機會。廣泛的分析和實驗表明，PhysScene補充了現有基準，並建立了一個有價值的測試平台，以推進科學視覺推理。該數據集可在 https://github.com/ZMH-SDUST/PhysScene 公開獲得。
2606.09368.author: Minghao Zou et.al.
2606.09368.authors: Minghao Zou, Qingtian Zeng, Shangkun Liu, Yanda Meng, Guanghui Yue, Baoquan Zhao, Abdulmotaleb El Saddik, Wei Zhou
